title: helichrysum plebeium
intro: Helichrysum plebeium, also known as the yellow daisy or mountain daisy, is a plant species in the sunflower family that is native to South Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that help to reduce swelling and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Helichrysum plebeium include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as essential oils, tinctures, and teas, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
